title: Sport Zone Kids Archery Set with Target, Indoor & Outdoor Play, Ages 3+, Includes Bow, 3 Arrows and Quiver
features: COMPLETE SET: Includes a durable bow, 3 safety-tipped arrows, target board with scoring zones up to 75 points, and convenient arrow quiver for storage
VERSATILE PLAY: Perfect for both indoor and outdoor activities, allowing children to practice their aim and develop hand-eye coordination in any setting
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for children aged 3 and above, featuring lightweight materials and easy-to-use components for safe play
SCORING TARGET: Colourful target board with multiple scoring rings (10-75 points) helps children improve accuracy while learning basic mathematics
PORTABLE DESIGN: Lightweight construction with included quiver makes it easy to transport and store all components together
description: Product Description Introduce your little ones to the exciting world of archery with this Sport Zone Kids Archery Set! Perfect for both indoor and outdoor play, this comprehensive set includes everything needed to start developing coordination and targeting skills. The set comes with a specially designed bow, three safe arrows, a convenient quiver for arrow storage, and a colourful target board featuring multiple scoring zones up to 75 points. The bright orange quiver features an adjustable strap for comfortable carrying, while the bow's blue and orange design makes it visually appealing to young archers. The lightweight construction and child-friendly materials make it ideal for children aged 3 and above. Whether practising in the garden or setting up an indoor target range, this archery set provides hours of engaging play while helping develop hand-eye coordination, patience, and concentration. The target's clear scoring zones help children learn basic mathematics as they add up their points. This set strikes the perfect balance between fun and skill development, making it an excellent choice for active children who love trying new activities. Safety Warning Warning: Not Suitable for children under 36 months: Choking Hazard - Small Parts
